narrative:
Precinct Meigs (precinct in Muskingum County) has 141 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 48.2 percentage points.
